product_overview: HEFESTO IA is a unified internal ERP/CRM web application consolidating commercial, financial, operational and administrative workflows with role-based access and Supabase-backed authentication. The PRD (pages 1-3) documents modules, KPIs and UX patterns (including custom modals and kanban boards).
core_goals: Provide a single, secure dashboard for cross-functional KPIs and quick navigation to core modules
Enable sales and client lifecycle management via an interactive commercial kanban with client records and commission tracking
Centralize financial operations (transactions, recurring payments, taxes) with clear auditability and deletion safeguards
Support operational and administrative task assignment across modules with dynamic assignee filtering and delivery tracking
Maintain consistent, premium UI patterns (custom confirmation modals, responsive KPI cards) and RBAC enforced at page/component level

features.name: Authentication & Security
features.description: Email/password authentication and session management via Supabase with role validations to control page and component access.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> If session exists, see dashboard -> Remain signed in and access protected routes
Navigate to / -> If no session, open sign-in form -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Submit credentials to Supabase Auth -> See dashboard
Navigate to / -> Open sign-in form -> Fill email field with invalid email -> Fill password field -> Submit credentials -> See authentication error message
Navigate to / -> Click sign out -> Session ends -> Attempt to access /comercial -> Be redirected to sign-in or see access denied

features.name: Dashboard Central (Global Dashboard)
features.description: High-level KPI aggregation and quick links to modules for executives and managers.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See KPI cards summarizing Sales, Finance, Operations and Administration -> Click KPI quick link to /comercial
Navigate to / -> See KPI card for overdue tasks -> Click KPI to expand details -> See list of overdue tasks with links to /operacional
Navigate to / -> See KPI widgets load slowly due to network issue -> See loading spinners -> See error toast for failed KPI fetch -> Retry fetch

features.name: Commercial Kanban (Comercial)
features.description: Drag-and-drop kanban to manage deals and clients, create deals/clients and assign users; supports commission tracking and meeting scheduling.
user_flows: Navigate to /comercial -> See kanban columns for Prospecting, Negotiation, Won, Lost -> Click create new deal button -> Fill deal fields -> Click Save -> See new deal card appear
Navigate to /comercial -> Drag deal card from Prospecting to Negotiation -> Drop card into Negotiation column -> Assign user to deal -> See assignee avatar on card
Navigate to /comercial -> Drag deal card within same column to reorder -> See reorder visually update -> Refresh page -> See card order reverted (known limitation)
Navigate to /comercial -> Click create new client -> Leave required field empty -> Click Save -> See validation error message and form remains open

features.name: Financial Management (Financeiro)
features.description: Manage transactions, recurring payments, taxes, budgets and KPI dashboards with safe deletion via custom modals.
user_flows: Navigate to /financeiro -> See transactions list and cashflow summary -> Click Create Transaction -> Fill transaction form -> Click Save -> See transaction appear in list
Navigate to /financeiro -> Click delete button on a transaction -> See custom in-app warning modal -> Confirm deletion -> API DELETE called -> See success toast and transaction removed
Navigate to /financeiro -> Click delete button on a transaction -> See custom in-app warning modal -> Confirm deletion -> API returns error -> See error message and transaction remains
Navigate to /financeiro -> Open Recorrências view -> Click Create Recorrência -> Fill schedule details -> Click Save -> See recurring payment listed

features.name: Operational Task Management (Operacional)
features.description: Kanban-style board for technical/operational tasks, delivery radar for deadlines, and workload/effort tracking. Tasks can be assigned across modules.
user_flows: Navigate to /operacional -> See task kanban columns (To Do, In Progress, Review, Done) -> Click new task button -> Open task creation modal
Navigate to /operacional -> Open task creation modal -> Fill task title and description -> Select assignees from dynamically filtered dropdown list -> Click Save -> See new task card on kanban
Navigate to /operacional -> Open task creation modal -> Leave title empty -> Select assignees -> Click Save -> See validation error; correct title -> Click Save -> See task added
Navigate to /operacional -> See Delivery Radar highlighting tasks <= 3 days -> Click highlighted task -> See task detail and deadline health visualization

features.name: Administrative Demands & Meetings (Administrativo)
features.description: Manage internal demands, meeting lifecycle via a meetings kanban and a history viewer for auditing.
user_flows: Navigate to /administrativo -> See meetings kanban with statuses Scheduled, Concluded, Canceled -> Click create meeting -> Fill meeting details -> Click Save -> See meeting in Scheduled column
Navigate to /administrativo -> Click a scheduled meeting -> Mark as Concluded -> See meeting move to Concluded column -> See entry in History Viewer
Navigate to /administrativo -> Open demand creation modal -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Save -> See validation errors -> Fill missing fields -> Save successfully
Navigate to /administrativo -> Click delete on a demand -> See custom confirmation modal -> Cancel deletion -> See demand remains

features.name: Directory & Collaborator Management (Diretório)
features.description: Client and collaborator directory with subscription monitoring, collaborator activation/deactivation and module access grants; destructive actions use custom modals.
user_flows: Navigate to /diretorio -> See list of clients and collaborators -> Click collaborator -> Edit permissions -> Toggle /diretorio access -> Click Save -> See permission update
Navigate to /diretorio -> Click deactivate collaborator -> See custom confirmation modal -> Confirm deactivation -> See collaborator status set to inactive
Navigate to /diretorio -> Search for client by name -> See filtered results -> Click client -> See subscription lifecycle and mensalidates
Navigate to /diretorio -> Click delete client -> See confirmation modal -> Confirm deletion -> API returns error -> See error toast and client remains

features.name: Calendar (Calendário)
features.description: System-wide calendar consolidating commercial meetings, administrative events and operational deadlines in a grid format.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendario -> See month grid populated with meetings and deadlines -> Click a calendar cell -> Open event creation modal -> Fill details -> Click Save -> See event on calendar
Navigate to /calendario -> Click existing event -> Edit time and attendees -> Click Save -> See event updated
Navigate to /calendario -> Click day with many events -> See performance lag and loading indicator -> Click Retry -> Events load successfully

features.name: Internal Chat (Chat)
features.description: Internal messaging system for team communication (future integration planned).
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> See list of recent conversations -> Click conversation -> See message history -> Type message -> Send message -> See message appear
Navigate to /chat -> Click new conversation -> Select recipient -> Send first message -> See conversation added to recent list
Navigate to /chat -> Type message while offline -> Click Send -> See network error -> Message stays unsent and user sees retry option

features.name: Notifications (Notificações)
features.description: User notification center for system events, KPI alerts and overdue task notices.
user_flows: Navigate to /notificacoes -> See list of unread notifications -> Click a notification -> Be taken to related route (e.g., /operacional) -> See context item
Navigate to /notificacoes -> Click Mark all as read -> See notification count reset
Navigate to /notificacoes -> Attempt to load notifications with expired session -> See authentication error -> Redirect to sign-in

features.name: Templates & Useful Links (Templates)
features.description: Repository for reusable text/email templates and a curated list of useful external sites.
user_flows: Navigate to /templates -> See list of templates -> Click Create Template -> Fill subject and body -> Click Save -> See template appear in list
Navigate to /templates -> Click template edit -> Change content -> Click Save -> See updated template
Navigate to /templates -> Click delete template -> See custom confirmation modal -> Confirm deletion -> API returns failure -> See error toast and template remains

features.name: Configurations & Permissions (Configuracoes)
features.description: System settings, role-based permissions, and category management for modules and users.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuracoes -> See settings panels and user permission lists -> Click edit on a role -> Modify permissions -> Click Save -> See permissions updated
Navigate to /configuracoes -> Attempt to grant module access to a user without sufficient admin rights -> See access denied message and changes blocked
Navigate to /configuracoes -> Change a system category -> Click Save -> See success toast -> Updated category reflected throughout app

routes.description: Main dashboard with KPIs and charts
System-wide calendar for events and tasks

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and session management using Supabase

features.name: Commercial Kanban
features.description: Drag and drop kanban board for managing deals and clients

features.name: Cross-Module Task Assignment
features.description: Assigning operational and administrative tasks to users based on module access rather than rigid categories.
user_interactions: Select assignees from dynamically filtered dropdown list

features.name: Custom Deletion Modals
features.description: Using custom, consistent app UI modals for deletion warning prompts instead of native browser confirm boxes.
user_interactions: Click delete button on an entity

known_limitations.impact: Reordering cards within the same column is not saved to the database.
